instruction: Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity terms.
input: An issue was discovered in CALDERA 2.8.1. It contains multiple reflected, stored, and self XSS vulnerabilities that may be exploited by authenticated and unauthenticated attackers.
output: CALDERA 2.8.1 contains multiple XSS vulnerabilities which include reflected, stored, and self XSS. These vulnerabilities can be exploited by both authenticated and unauthenticated attackers.
